title: fix(operator): honor -stderrthreshold when -logtostderr is enabled
body:
Supersedes #9712 (unrebaseable due to extensive upstream changes).

## Summary

Migrate from klog v1 to klog/v2 and opt into the fixed stderrthreshold behavior by setting `legacy_stderr_threshold_behavior=false`. Also pin `stderrthreshold=INFO` to preserve current observable behavior where INFO and WARNING messages appear on stderr.

Without this fix, klog's legacy behavior causes `-stderrthreshold` to be silently ignored when `-logtostderr=true` (the default), as reported in [kubernetes/klog#212](https://github.com/kubernetes/klog/issues/212).

## Changes

- `cmd/operator/options/options.go`: Replace `k8s.io/klog` import with `k8s.io/klog/v2`, add `legacy_stderr_threshold_behavior=false` and `stderrthreshold=INFO` flag settings
- `go.mod`: Bump `k8s.io/klog/v2` from v2.130.1 (indirect) to v2.140.0 (direct), remove `k8s.io/klog v1.0.0`
- `go.sum`: Updated accordingly

## Testing

- All `cmd/` packages compile successfully
- The fix is a runtime-only change (flag settings at startup) — no new code paths added

---
> Status: Ready for review — rebased onto latest master.

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ import (
 	"strings"
 	"time"
 
-	"k8s.io/klog"
+	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
 
 	"github.com/dapr/dapr/pkg/metrics"
 	securityConsts "github.com/dapr/dapr/pkg/security/consts"
@@ -68,6 +68,8 @@ func New() *Options {
 	klogFlags := flag.NewFlagSet("klog", flag.ExitOnError)
 	klog.InitFlags(klogFlags)
 	klogFlags.Set("logtostderr", "true")
+	klogFlags.Set("legacy_stderr_threshold_behavior", "false")
+	klogFlags.Set("stderrthreshold", "INFO")
 
 	flag.StringVar(&opts.Config, "config", defaultDaprSystemConfigName, "Path to config file, or name of a configuration object")

@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ require (
 	k8s.io/cli-runtime v0.30.2
 	k8s.io/client-go v0.32.3
 	k8s.io/code-generator v0.31.0
-	k8s.io/klog v1.0.0
+	k8s.io/klog/v2 v2.140.0
 	k8s.io/metrics v0.30.2
 	k8s.io/utils v0.0.0-20250502105355-0f33e8f1c979
 	modernc.org/sqlite v1.34.5

 	modernc.org/libc v1.61.9 // indirect
 	modernc.org/mathutil v1.7.1 // indirect
